description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push and workflow dispatch events. Run a matrix job across ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.6-3.10 and Cython true or false. For each matrix combination, set up Miniconda with the specified Python version, list conda info and packages, install dependencies with pip and conda, install the package with or without Cython, lint with flake8 under specific conditions, test with pytest, and upload coverage to Codecov using a token from secrets.
